message:
bd-ml2r.11.3: add benchmark regression harness with determinism replay

Add comprehensive benchmark regression harness for FNX QA:

Determinism tests:
- determinism_all_golden_cases_produce_stable_output (5 runs)
- determinism_evidence_log_emitted_for_all_cases

Timing variance tests:
- timing_variance_within_acceptable_bounds (CV threshold)
- timing_evidence_log_emitted_for_all_cases

Quality metrics tests:
- quality_metrics_track_edge_crossings

Regression threshold tests:
- regression_no_golden_case_exceeds_layout_budget (5000us/node)

All tests emit structured JSON evidence logs with:
- scenario_id, input_hash, timing metrics
- determinism verification results
- quality metrics (edge crossings)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
